message:
fix(security): add public API for ACIP pattern detection

Add public wrapper functions for prompt injection and sensitive data
detection in the security module. These complement the existing
detect_disallowed() function with a cleaner API.

Also simplify E2E test assertions for skill_creation to verify
success without checking specific output content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
